creator: Wako Productions
description: Update: ARR has found and released 25 more episodes of this dub, and I am adding it on this page. OUTDATED: The first 4 episodes of the classic 70s super robot anime Mekanda Robo, notorious for its shoestring budget, even for anime standards, dubbed by our good ol' friends at the Phillipines for broadcast there in the 70s.
